description:
An interactive, deeply relaxing Koi Pond. Move your cursor to create ripples, watch the fish scatter, or click to feed them!

[h2]Features[/h2]

[list]
[*] [b]Interactive Environment:[/b] Move your cursor to create dynamic ripples.
[*] [b]Feed the Koi:[/b] Click to drop food for the fish to seek out.
[*] [b]Shy Fish:[/b] Fish naturally scatter and avoid your cursor.
[*] [b]Procedural Animation:[/b] Realistic segment-based fish movement.
[*] [b]Aesthetic Caustics:[/b] Procedural light patterns synced to the water and fish.
[/list]

[hr][/hr]

[h2]Highly Customizable[/h2]
Adjust Wallpaper Engine properties to fit your setup:

[list]
[*] [b]Koi Customization:[/b] Count, speed, and size.
[*] [b]Water Color:[/b] Adjustable hue.
[*] [b]Fish Color Themes:[/b] Traditional, Neon, and Monochrome.
[*] [b]Toggles:[/b] Caustics, feeding, and shy fish behavior.
[*] [b]Physics:[/b] Ripple strength.
[/list]

[hr][/hr]
[i]If you enjoy this wallpaper, please consider leaving a rating![/i]
title: Koi Pond
